title: 有馬記念の後に・燃料、補給

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! Absolutely incredible! Please give a
round of applause for the winner of this year's
Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Mayano Top Gun was absolutely
incredible. For a moment there, I thought she was
gonna beat Brian.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Then you still have a lot to learn. The
difference in ability between them is huge.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Regardless, she's quite capable. She might have a
chance... at next year's Arima.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Pant... Wheeze... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay, Mayano? You look like you're in
pain...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness. You're her trainer, right? It
looks like she's pushed herself too far. She needs
to rest immediately...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It's okay... I'm fine. It's just...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That was so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's move on. If you have a question
you'd like to ask, please raise—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Pick me, pick me, pick me!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Okay. How about yo—Mayano Top Gun?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hi, Brian! What race are you gonna run in next?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wanna race you again!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Right up until the end of that race just now, I
didn't know what to do or what to expect... My
heart was pounding the whole time...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It was so, so, sooo exciting!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Next question, please...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait! No fair! Don't avoid my question!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What did you just say? You think I'm trying to avoid you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, because you are! You're avoiding my
challenge!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Even though you're so powerful and twinkly!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Is it because you're worried that you'll actually
lose to me next time?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
E-erm... Mayano Top Gun... You do know you just
lo—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But I'm gonna win next time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I finally feel like I can twinkle. There's no way I'd
be satisfied with letting things end here!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
B-but... next time won't be any different. There's
a clear gap in ability between the two of—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: The Hanshin Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: There's your answer. Next question.

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Uh... Okay then! Any another questions?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh... That was pretty fresh, Mayano.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I should have expected you to do something
reckless. You truly don't know fear. Either that,
or—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Haha! She's got you hook, line, and sinker!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But that's a good thing. I'll have to remember the
two of you.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Traaaaainerrrrr!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Listen, listen! I wanna race in the Hanshin
Daishoten next!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh, how'd you know? Telepathy?! Or are we
soulmates?!
choice_data_list: I figured it out from how excited you were.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Of course you'd realize.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm definitely going to beat Brian at the
Hanshin Daishoten! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll face whatever turbulence head-on—because
that's the way I fly!
